response.overview: Attorney Marcus Coles, is known for his fierce courtroom battles defending hip hop's elite and his playboy reputation. He's drawn to a case involving a cop falsely accused of stealing evidence. He soon uncovers a deadly police corruption ring, facing escalating threats from dangerous players as he seeks the truth. With his life and career on the line, he races to expose the truth.
response.tagline: An attorney uncovers a deadly police corruption ring while defending a falsely accused cop. With his life and career on the line, he races to expose the truth where justice collides with danger.
response.title: The 6th
